items.original_text: We introduce a novel training data selection based on the learning percentage of the samples. We assert that current language models possess the capability to autonomously select high-quality training data, leading to comparable or improved performance compared to training on the entire dataset.
items.claim_text: 提出基于学习百分比的训练数据选择方法，LLM能自主选择高质量数据，达到或超越全数据训练效果 [EV-001]

items.original_text: Our experiments span different-sized models, revealing that this characteristic holds for models ranging from 1B to 13B in size.
items.claim_text: 实验覆盖1B到13B不同规模模型，证明数据选择能力在各规模均成立 [EV-002]

items.original_text: The data hardness transfers across model scales: samples identified as difficult by the 350M model are also useful for the 13B model (Kendall-Tau=0.52).
items.claim_text: 数据硬度可跨模型规模迁移：350M选出的困难样本对13B模型同样有效（Kendall-Tau=0.52）[EV-003]

items.original_text: Using only 3% of the selected data, the 13B model outperforms models trained on the full dataset.
items.claim_text: 13B模型仅用3%的精选数据即可超越全数据训练效果 [EV-004]

items.original_text: LP(i) = (P_{i-1} - P_i) / (P_0 - P_n), which measures how much of the total learning amount is accomplished in the i-th epoch.
items.claim_text: LP(i)公式：衡量第i个epoch完成的总学习量比例 [EV-005]

items.original_text: Since language models are known to learn most of the information in just one epoch, we consider LP(1) to rank the training data.
items.claim_text: 由于LLM在一个epoch内学到大部分信息，使用LP(1)排序训练数据 [EV-006]

items.original_text: The 33% High bucket results in worse performance than random selection for all models, highlighting that easy samples alone are insufficient.
items.claim_text: 最高33%最容易样本桶（简单样本）的性能反而不如随机选择，仅用简单样本不够 [EV-007]

items.original_text: We observe a downward trend in the minimum percentage of difficult data required for achieving a win rate of at least 50 with an increase in the model's size.
items.claim_text: 随着模型规模增大，达到50%胜率所需的最小困难数据比例下降 [EV-008]

items.original_text: With only a 1.4-point drop in average win rate, even a small 350M model can curate training data for a large 13B model.
items.claim_text: 350M小模型可为13B大模型筛选训练数据，平均胜率仅下降1.4点 [EV-009]

items.original_text: The Kendall-tau scores of LP(1) derived from OPT-models against OPT 13B on both Alpaca-Data and Dolly datasets are positive, indicating a positive correlation.
items.claim_text: OPT系列模型的LP(1)与OPT-13B的Kendall-tau相关性均为正，表明正相关 [EV-010]

items.original_text: Models trained on data selected via LP_app outperforms its counterpart trained on data selected via LP across the majority of models.
items.claim_text: LP_app筛选数据训练的模型在大多数情况下优于LP筛选的模型 [EV-011]

items.original_text: In 50 evaluations, the model trained on the full dataset was preferred, while in 58 evaluations, participants found the model trained on 5% data selected using our method to be better.
items.claim_text: 人类评估：58票偏好5%精选数据模型，50票偏好全数据模型 [EV-012]

items.original_text: The average response length within the 1% Low LP(1) subset of Alpaca-Data is 547 characters, contrasting with the dataset's average of 270.
items.claim_text: 困难样本（最低LP(1)的1%）平均响应长度547字符，数据集平均270字符 [EV-013]

items.original_text: In the lowest LP(1) subset, the noise rate is 2.4%, significantly higher than the overall dataset's noise rate of 0.47%.
items.claim_text: 困难样本子集噪声率2.4%，显著高于数据集整体0.47% [EV-014]

items.original_text: Instruction Mining proposes to identify high-quality instruction tuning data instances using a model-based approach, achieving data efficiency in LLM fine-tuning.
items.claim_text: Instruction Mining提出使用模型方法识别高质量指令数据，提高LLM微调的数据效率 [EV-015]

items.original_text: The core idea is to use metrics derived from the model itself to assess and select instructional data, similar to the LP-based approach but applied differently.
items.claim_text: 核心思想是使用模型自身的指标来评估和选择指令数据，与LP方法核心思想相似 [EV-016]
